Who I Am

About Me

Raised in Chicago, IL — the city that shaped my character and taught me how to push through anything. In 2019, I was involved in a life-changing hit and run accident that put me in a three-week coma and left me with permanent vision loss in my left eye.

"Since then, I've had one gear — forward. If anything, losing something made me hungrier to build something."

From car detailer to customization shop owner to automotive repair shop manager — the car scene has been woven into everything I do. Chicago raised me on it, and I built a career out of it.

But before the cars, there was the controller. I've been a gamer my whole life — competed in Fortnite back when the game first dropped, and computers have always been part of my world. The machine I run today is a reflection of everything I've worked toward.

When GTA 6 drops, I'll be live. Follow me and stay tuned — you don't want to miss what's coming.

My Brand

SYFER

Chicago Collection
SYFER x Chicago — Drop 01

SYFER is the brand I've been building in the background — rooted in Chicago, built around the same grit that got me here. Street-inspired. No fluff.

The first drop is coming. Limited run. Once it's gone, it's gone. Get on the list and be the first to know when it goes live.
